title: ListImageRecipesRequest
description: ListImageRecipesRequest schema from EC2 Image Builder

allOf.description: The owner defines which image recipes you want to list. By default, this request will only show image recipes owned by your account. You can use this field to specify if you want to view image recipes owned by yourself, by Amazon, or those image recipes that have been shared with you by other customers.

Use the following filters to streamline results:

  • name

  • parentImage

  • platform
The maximum items to return in a request.
A token to specify where to start paginating. This is the NextToken from a previously truncated response.
